rules.title: Shell-like MCP tools should require approval
rules.titleZh: 类似 shell 的 MCP 工具应要求审批
rules.description: Detects MCP tool names that look like shell or command execution operations.
rules.descriptionZh: 检测看起来像 shell 或命令执行操作的 MCP 工具名称。
rules.recommendation: Add an approval policy before allowing shell-like MCP tools to run.
rules.recommendationZh: 在允许类似 shell 的 MCP 工具执行前增加审批策略。

rules.title: Filesystem write MCP tools should be reviewed
rules.titleZh: 文件写入类 MCP 工具需要 review
rules.description: Looks for MCP tool names that suggest filesystem writes or deletion.
rules.descriptionZh: 查找暗示文件写入或删除的 MCP 工具名称。
rules.recommendation: Document allowed paths, approval expectations, and rollback behavior.
rules.recommendationZh: 记录允许访问的路径、审批要求和回滚行为。

rules.title: Action-like MCP tool names should be reviewed
rules.titleZh: 动作类 MCP 工具名称需要 review
rules.description: Looks for tool names that may imply external side effects.
rules.descriptionZh: 查找可能意味着外部副作用的工具名称。
rules.recommendation: Add trace examples and approval notes for side-effecting tools.
rules.recommendationZh: 为有副作用的工具补充 trace 示例和审批说明。
